questions.text: Which planet is the hottest in our solar system?
What is the name of the liquid part of human blood?
Which gas is used by electric signs to create a bright reddish-orange glow?
What is the name for a scientist who studies weather and climate?
What type of simple machine is a flat surface tilted at an angle, like a ramp?
Which part of the human eye adjusts to control the amount of light entering?
What is the name of the process by which a gas changes directly into a solid?
Which type of animal is born from an egg but feeds its young with milk?
What is the common term for the sudden shaking of the ground caused by movements in the Earth's crust?
Which unit is commonly used by scientists to measure the frequency of sound or waves?
